1.name: Date
1.description: When the content was uploaded by the channel

1.name: Views
1.description: The current views of the upload.

1.name: Video Projected Views
1.description: The original projection for how many views the video should have at day 30.

1.name: Duration
1.description: Duration of the content in seconds.

1.name: Deleted At
1.description: Date the content was deleted at.

1.name: Evergreen Score
1.description: Ratio between views gained up to day 30 and views gained from day 30 to day 180.

2.name: Channels
2.description: Count of unique channels that mentioned the brand

2.name: Mentions
2.description: Count of unique uploads the brand was mentioned in

2.name: Last Mention
2.description: Upload date of the most recent brand mention.

2.name: First Mention
2.description: Upload date of the first brand mention.

2.name: Views Sum
2.description: Sum of views where the brand was mentioned.

2.name: Weighted Price
2.description: Sum of weighted price across open proposals.

2.name: Avg. Comments
2.description: Average comments per YouTube video featuring this brand.

2.name: Avg. Evergreenness
2.description: Average evergreenness for videos featuring this brand.

2.name: Avg. Duration
2.description: Average duration of content featuring this brand.

2.name: Max. Views
2.description: Highest views on videos featuring this brand.

2.name: Min. Views
2.description: Lowest views on videos featuring this brand.

3.name: Content
3.description: Number of uploads by this channel.

3.name: Last Published
3.description: Publish date of the last content.

3.name: First Published
3.description: Publish date of the first content.

3.name: Total Views
3.description: Sum of all views on all videos by this channel.

3.name: Sponsors
3.description: Number of unique brands that sponsored at least 1 video.

3.name: Latest AdSpot Price
3.description: Price from the latest active AdSpot.

3.name: Projected Views
3.description: Projected views for the channel's next video.

3.name: Trend
3.description: Growth trend score — higher means faster-growing channel.

8.name: Publish Date
8.description: Day the sponsorship was uploaded by the publisher.

8.name: Purchase Date
8.description: When the sponsorship was accepted and purchased.

8.name: Last Updated
8.description: Modified on any change to the proposal or sponsorship.

8.name: Match Grade
8.description: Sponsorship Score measuring how attractive a channel is to sponsors.
